title: Vanilla Revamped
description: A Datapack and Resource pack combo that aims to add new structures, weapons, tools, and armor to improve the Minecraft experience.
body:
# Overview
This is a datapack/resourcepack combo that adds new items, structures, loot, and music discs to the game. While currently in development my plans are to continue to improve Minecraft's base exploration, add new items, offer some quality of life (QOL) changes, and make the vanilla experience feel fresh and revamped.

# New Recipies
Recipes appear in crafting book.
## Armor and Cosmetics
- Copper Armor
- Tall Hat
- Voided Helmet

![Copper Helmet Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/681d7d1dd1587ae29668838e7728ff025639d943.png)
![Copper Chestplate Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67333da600a71e3c4d3fb3026a764b38c2045a2f.png)
![Copper Leggings Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c33a35c91b0522fb97475ca70c7267e3dab5f7.png)
![Copper Boots Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1882a6f2d7e67a52ab33554cb61903d66dcc8b17.png)
![Tall Hat Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd0c34bd1c83819b0749a749aba189baab647e74_0.webp)
![Voided Helmet Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d63a5bd6ce4faaab323fbe2f3c6ffb88a49182d.png)

## Tools and Weapons
- Netherite Paxel
- Katana
- Mjölnir (current test item)

![Netherite Paxel Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43711dd413b38c95497765f4dac5c7008239e5da.png)
![Katana Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da58b7ffd88e705eaeafbd57e55c6ce10ae05e4.png)
![Mjölnir Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7bc26183d9c6ac0b9c87aa0b6bd11750d380847.png)

## Miscellaneous
### Music Discs
- T_en_M & Laudividni - Voyage 

![Music Disc - Voyage Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2cb2659c2b0e4321dcf0f8803d4558c796226f3.png)

# New Structures
These are the new structures that have been added to the pack.
## Overworld Structures
- Fire Tower
- Stone Dungeon (test purposes only but currently spawns)

## Nether Structures
More coming in the future!

## End Structures
More coming in the future!

# New Biomes
Possibility of adding new Biomes!

# New QOL Changes
Plans to add smelting of raw ore blocks.

# Installing the Pack
To install this pack simply put the datapack in the datapack folder of your world (found if your saves folder). And activate the resourcepack by putting it in your resourcepacks folder and then activating it in game.



# Issuses
## Known Issues
- Items don't show up in the creative inventory 
- Item recipes don't appear in JEI or REI

## Report Issues
Report issuses by using the [issue tracker](https://github.com/DubbleD83/Vanilla-Revamped/issues) located in the links section. Make sure to include enough information to fix the bug.
